creator: terry@sucked-in.com
text:
On 31/05/2011 4:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/prepflog,
>
> Please note that PR ports/157455 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157455
>
I am the maintainer and accept this update.
